Home

Pricing plans

We offer three plans suited to different team sizes.

Starter

Five seats and 50GB of storage for ten dollars a month, billed monthly or annually.

Team

Twenty seats and 500GB of storage for forty dollars a month, with usage-based scaling for teams that grow.

Enterprise

Custom seat counts, dedicated support, and on-premise deployment options. Contact our sales team for a quote.

© 2024 Example
